code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> NormalOperation: Sistem Başlatıldı
    
    state NormalOperation {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> BaselineEstablishment
        
        state BaselineEstablishment {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> HistoricalDataCollection
            HistoricalDataCollection --> PatternLearning: Geçmiş Veri Toplandı
            PatternLearning --> NormalProfileCreation: Patern Öğrenildi
            NormalProfileCreation --> ThresholdCalculation: Normal Profil Oluşturuldu
            ThresholdCalculation --> BaselineReady: Eşikler Hesaplandı
        }
        
        BaselineEstablishment --> ContinuousMonitoring: Baseline Hazır
        
        state ContinuousMonitoring {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> RealtimeDataCollection
            RealtimeDataCollection --> StatisticalAnalysis: Anlık Veri Toplanıyor
            
            state StatisticalAnalysis {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> MeanCalculation
                MeanCalculation --> VarianceAnalysis: Ortalama Hesaplandı
                VarianceAnalysis --> StandardDeviationCheck: Varyans Analizi
                StandardDeviationCheck --> TrendAnalysis: Standart Sapma Kontrolü
                TrendAnalysis --> AnalysisComplete: Trend Analizi
            }
            
            StatisticalAnalysis --> FrequencyDomainAnalysis: İstatistik Tamamlandı
            
            state FrequencyDomainAnalysis {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> FFTTransform
                FFTTransform --> HarmonicDetection: FFT Dönüşümü
                HarmonicDetection --> SpectralAnalysis: Harmonik Tespiti
                SpectralAnalysis --> FrequencyAnomalyCheck: Spektral Analiz
            }
            
            FrequencyDomainAnalysis --> RealtimeDataCollection: Devam Et
        }
    }
    
    NormalOperation --> AnomalyDetectionTriggered: Anormallik Şüphesi
    
    state AnomalyDetectionTriggered {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> InitialAlert
        InitialAlert --> ConfidenceScoring: İlk Alarm
        
        state ConfidenceScoring {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> MultiMetricEvaluation
            MultiMetricEvaluation --> CorrelationAnalysis: Çoklu Metrik Değerlendirme
            CorrelationAnalysis --> BayesianInference: Korelasyon Analizi
            BayesianInference --> ConfidenceCalculated: Bayesian Çıkarım
        }
        
        ConfidenceScoring --> SeverityClassification: Güven Skoru Hesaplandı
        
        state SeverityClassification {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> LowSeverity
            [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> MediumSeverity
            [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> HighSeverity
            [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> CriticalSeverity
            
            LowSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Düşük Önem
            MediumSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Orta Önem
            HighSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Yüksek Önem
            CriticalSeverity --> ClassificationComplete: Kritik Önem
        }
    }
    
    AnomalyDetectionTriggered --> ThreatIntelligence: Sınıflandırma Tamamlandı
    AnomalyDetectionTriggered --> NormalOperation: Yanlış Alarm
    
    state ThreatIntelligence {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> SignatureMatching
        SignatureMatching --> BehavioralAnalysis: İmza Eşleştirme
        
        state BehavioralAnalysis {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> PatternRecognition
            PatternRecognition --> AttackVectorIdentification: Patern Tanıma
            AttackVectorIdentification --> TTPAnalysis: Saldırı Vektörü Belirlendi
            TTPAnalysis --> AttributionAttempt: TTP Analizi
        }
        
        BehavioralAnalysis --> ThreatConfirmed: Davranış Analizi Tamamlandı
    }
    
    ThreatIntelligence --> ResponseStrategy: Tehdit Onaylandı
    
    state ResponseStrategy {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> StrategySelection
        
        state StrategySelection {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> PassiveMonitoring
            [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> ActiveMitigation
            [HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> AggressiveContainment
            
            PassiveMonitoring --> StrategyChosen: Düşük Önem İçin
            ActiveMitigation --> StrategyChosen: Orta Önem İçin
            AggressiveContainment --> StrategyChosen: Yüksek Önem İçin
        }
        
        StrategySelection --> ActionPlanGeneration: Strateji Seçildi
        
        state ActionPlanGeneration {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> ResourceAllocation
            ResourceAllocation --> PriorityAssignment: Kaynak Tahsisi
            PriorityAssignment --> TimelineEstablishment: Öncelik Atandı
            TimelineEstablishment --> PlanReady: Zaman Çizelgesi Oluşturuldu
        }
    }
    
    ResponseStrategy --> MitigationExecution: Plan Hazır
    
    state MitigationExecution {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> ImmediateActions
        
        state ImmediateActions {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> RateLimiting
            RateLimiting --> LoadThrottling: Hız Sınırlama
            LoadThrottling --> ConnectionFiltering: Yük Azaltma
            ConnectionFiltering --> ImmediateComplete: Bağlantı Filtreleme
        }
        
        ImmediateActions --> ShortTermDefense: Acil Önlemler Alındı
        
        state ShortTermDefense {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> TrafficShaping
            TrafficShaping --> AdaptiveFiltering: Trafik Şekillendirme
            AdaptiveFiltering --> DynamicThresholdAdjustment: Adaptif Filtreleme
            DynamicThresholdAdjustment --> ShortTermComplete: Dinamik Eşik Ayarı
        }
        
        ShortTermDefense --> LongTermMitigation: Kısa Vade Tamamlandı
        
        state LongTermMitigation {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> SourceIsolation
            SourceIsolation --> NetworkSegmentation: Kaynak İzolasyonu
            NetworkSegmentation --> PolicyEnforcement: Ağ Segmentasyonu
            PolicyEnforcement --> LongTermComplete: Politika Uygulandı
        }
    }
    
    MitigationExecution --> ForensicAnalysis: Önlemler Alındı
    
    state ForensicAnalysis {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> EvidenceCollection
        
        state EvidenceCollection {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> LogAggregation
            LogAggregation --> NetworkTrafficCapture: Log Toplama
            NetworkTrafficCapture --> MemoryDump: Ağ Trafiği Yakalandı
            MemoryDump --> ArtifactPreservation: Bellek Dökümü
            ArtifactPreservation --> EvidenceSecured: Kanıt Korundu
        }
        
        EvidenceCollection --> RootCauseAnalysis: Kanıt Toplandı
        
        state RootCauseAnalysis {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> TimelineReconstruction
            TimelineReconstruction --> VectorAnalysis: Zaman Çizelgesi Yeniden Yapılandı
            VectorAnalysis --> VulnerabilityIdentification: Vektör Analizi
            VulnerabilityIdentification --> ImpactAssessment: Zafiyet Belirlendi
            ImpactAssessment --> RootCauseFound: Etki Değerlendirmesi
        }
        
        RootCauseAnalysis --> ReportGeneration: Kök Neden Bulundu
        
        state ReportGeneration {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> ExecutiveSummary
            ExecutiveSummary --> TechnicalDetails: Yönetici Özeti
            TechnicalDetails --> RecommendationsCreation: Teknik Detaylar
            RecommendationsCreation --> ReportComplete: Öneriler Oluşturuldu
        }
    }
    
    ForensicAnalysis --> RecoveryPhase: Analiz Tamamlandı
    
    state RecoveryPhase {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> SystemRestoration
        
        state SystemRestoration {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> ServiceValidation
            ServiceValidation --> IntegrityCheck: Servis Doğrulama
            IntegrityCheck --> ConfigurationReview: Bütünlük Kontrolü
            ConfigurationReview --> RestorationComplete: Yapılandırma İncelemesi
        }
        
        SystemRestoration --> SecurityHardening: Sistem Geri Yüklendi
        
        state SecurityHardening {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> PatchManagement
            PatchManagement --> ConfigurationUpdate: Yama Yönetimi
            ConfigurationUpdate --> PolicyRefinement: Yapılandırma Güncellendi
            PolicyRefinement --> HardeningComplete: Politika İyileştirme
        }
        
        SecurityHardening --> MonitoringEnhancement: Güvenlik Sertleştirildi
        
        state MonitoringEnhancement {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> NewSignatureDeployment
            NewSignatureDeployment --> ThresholdTuning: Yeni İmza Dağıtıldı
            ThresholdTuning --> AlertOptimization: Eşik Ayarı
            AlertOptimization --> EnhancementComplete: Alarm Optimizasyonu
        }
    }
    
    RecoveryPhase --> LessonsLearned: İyileştirme Tamamlandı
    
    state LessonsLearned {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> PostIncidentReview
        PostIncidentReview --> TeamDebriefing: Olay Sonrası İnceleme
        TeamDebriefing --> ProcessImprovement: Ekip Bilgilendirme
        ProcessImprovement --> KnowledgeBaseUpdate: Süreç İyileştirme
        KnowledgeBaseUpdate --> TrainingUpdate: Bilgi Tabanı Güncellendi
        TrainingUpdate --> LessonsDocumented: Eğitim Güncellendi
    }
    
    LessonsLearned --> NormalOperation: Dersler Belgelendi
    
    MitigationExecution --> EscalationRequired: Önlemler Yetersiz
    
    state EscalationRequired {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> IncidentEscalation
        IncidentEscalation --> ManagementNotification: Olay Yükseltildi
        ManagementNotification --> ExternalSupport: Yönetime Bildirildi
        ExternalSupport --> CrisisManagement: Dış Destek Çağrıldı
        CrisisManagement --> EmergencyProtocol: Kriz Yönetimi
        EmergencyProtocol --> SystemShutdown: Acil Durum Protokolü
    }
    
    EscalationRequired --> EmergencyRecovery: Sistem Kapatıldı
    
    state EmergencyRecovery {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> DisasterRecoveryPlan
        DisasterRecoveryPlan --> BackupActivation: Felaket Kurtarma Planı
        BackupActivation --> FailoverExecution: Yedek Aktivasyonu
        FailoverExecution --> BusinessContinuity: Failover Yürütüldü
        BusinessContinuity --> EmergencyComplete: İş Sürekliliği
    }
    
    EmergencyRecovery --> RecoveryPhase: Acil Durum Atlatıldı
    
    [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech的HIPAA合规系统设计一个完整的安全状态机。这个系统要覆盖从正常运营到异常检测、再到应急响应的全生命周期。
明白。我理解为系统启动后先进入NormalOperation状态，这个状态内部需要包含哪些子状态？是否需要先建立行为基线？
对，NormalOperation内部首先要做BaselineEstablishment。这个子状态需要包含HistoricalDataCollection收集历史数据，然后是PatternLearning学习正常模式，接着NormalProfileCreation创建正常画像，ThresholdCalculation计算阈值，最后达到BaselineReady。
已添加BaselineEstablishment及其内部状态流。基线准备好之后，系统应该进入持续监控阶段吧？
没错，BaselineReady之后进入ContinuousMonitoring。这里需要RealtimeDataCollection实时采集数据，然后进入StatisticalAnalysis做统计分析。
StatisticalAnalysis内部需要细化吗？比如均值、方差这些计算步骤？
需要细化。StatisticalAnalysis内部包含MeanCalculation计算均值，然后是VarianceAnalysis方差分析，StandardDeviationCheck标准差检查，TrendAnalysis趋势分析，最后AnalysisComplete。
已添加StatisticalAnalysis的详细子状态。分析完成后除了返回持续监控，是否还需要其他分支？
StatisticalAnalysis之后还要做FrequencyDomainAnalysis频域分析，包含FFTTransform、HarmonicDetection、SpectralAnalysis和FrequencyAnomalyCheck。完成后返回RealtimeDataCollection形成循环。
已添加频域分析模块。现在NormalOperation的结构比较完整了。当检测到异常时，系统如何流转？
当怀疑有异常时，从NormalOperation进入AnomalyDetectionTriggered状态。这里首先触发InitialAlert初始告警，然后进入ConfidenceScoring置信度评分。
ConfidenceScoring的具体计算流程是什么？
ConfidenceScoring包含MultiMetricEvaluation多指标评估，CorrelationAnalysis相关性分析，BayesianInference贝叶斯推断，最后ConfidenceCalculated。
已添加置信度评分流程。评分完成后进入严重性分类吗？
是的，ConfidenceCalculated之后进入SeverityClassification。需要四个等级：LowSeverity低严重、MediumSeverity中等、HighSeverity高严重、CriticalSeverity关键，都汇聚到ClassificationComplete。
已添加四级严重性分类。分类完成后有两个出口：一个是进入ThreatIntelligence，另一个是返回NormalOperation处理误报？
正确。如果是误报就回到NormalOperation，否则进入ThreatIntelligence进行威胁情报分析。
ThreatIntelligence内部从SignatureMatching签名匹配开始，然后是BehavioralAnalysis行为分析。行为分析需要进一步细化吗？
BehavioralAnalysis内部包含PatternRecognition模式识别，AttackVectorIdentification攻击向量识别，TTPAnalysis战术技术分析，AttributionAttempt溯源尝试，最后ThreatConfirmed。
已添加威胁情报分析流程。ThreatConfirmed之后应该进入响应策略制定？
对，进入ResponseStrategy响应策略。首先是StrategySelection策略选择，包含PassiveMonitoring被动监控、ActiveMitigation主动缓解、AggressiveContainment积极遏制三个选项。
这三个策略分别对应什么场景？
PassiveMonitoring对应低严重级别，ActiveMitigation对应中等，AggressiveContainment对应高严重。都汇聚到StrategyChosen。
已添加策略选择。StrategyChosen之后进入ActionPlanGeneration行动计划生成？
是的，ActionPlanGeneration包含ResourceAllocation资源分配，PriorityAssignment优先级分配，TimelineEstablishment时间线建立，最后PlanReady。
已添加行动计划生成。PlanReady之后进入MitigationExecution缓解执行？
对，MitigationExecution包含三个层次：ImmediateActions立即行动、ShortTermDefense短期防御、LongTermMitigation长期缓解。
ImmediateActions内部具体包含哪些措施？
ImmediateActions包含RateLimiting速率限制，LoadThrottling负载节流，ConnectionFiltering连接过滤，最后ImmediateComplete。
已添加立即行动。接下来是ShortTermDefense？
ShortTermDefense包含TrafficShaping流量整形，AdaptiveFiltering自适应过滤，DynamicThresholdAdjustment动态阈值调整，最后ShortTermComplete。
已添加短期防御。LongTermMitigation呢？
LongTermMitigation包含SourceIsolation源隔离，NetworkSegmentation网络分段，PolicyEnforcement策略执行，最后LongTermComplete。
已添加长期缓解。MitigationExecution完成后进入ForensicAnalysis取证分析？
对，MitigationExecution之后进入ForensicAnalysis。包含EvidenceCollection证据收集、RootCauseAnalysis根因分析、ReportGeneration报告生成三个子状态。
EvidenceCollection需要包含哪些取证步骤？
EvidenceCollection包含LogAggregation日志聚合，NetworkTrafficCapture网络流量捕获，MemoryDump内存转储，ArtifactPreservation工件保存，最后EvidenceSecured。
已添加证据收集流程。EvidenceSecured之后进入RootCauseAnalysis？
RootCauseAnalysis包含TimelineReconstruction时间线重建，VectorAnalysis向量分析，VulnerabilityIdentification漏洞识别，ImpactAssessment影响评估，最后RootCauseFound。
已添加根因分析。RootCauseFound之后进入ReportGeneration？
ReportGeneration包含ExecutiveSummary执行摘要，TechnicalDetails技术细节，RecommendationsCreation建议制定，最后ReportComplete。
已添加报告生成。ForensicAnalysis完成后进入RecoveryPhase恢复阶段？
对，RecoveryPhase包含SystemRestoration系统恢复、SecurityHardening安全加固、MonitoringEnhancement监控增强三个子状态。
SystemRestoration的具体步骤是什么？
SystemRestoration包含ServiceValidation服务验证，IntegrityCheck完整性检查，ConfigurationReview配置审查，最后RestorationComplete。
已添加系统恢复。SecurityHardening呢？
SecurityHardening包含PatchManagement补丁管理，ConfigurationUpdate配置更新，PolicyRefinement策略优化，最后HardeningComplete。
已添加安全加固。MonitoringEnhancement包含哪些内容？
MonitoringEnhancement包含NewSignatureDeployment新签名部署，ThresholdTuning阈值调优，AlertOptimization告警优化，最后EnhancementComplete。
已添加监控增强。RecoveryPhase完成后进入LessonsLearned经验总结？
对，LessonsLearned包含PostIncidentReview事后审查，TeamDebriefing团队汇报，ProcessImprovement流程改进，KnowledgeBaseUpdate知识库更新，TrainingUpdate培训更新，最后LessonsDocumented。
已添加经验总结。LessonsDocumented之后回到NormalOperation形成闭环？
是的，形成完整闭环。但还需要考虑一个分支：如果MitigationExecution无法有效控制威胁，需要进入EscalationRequired升级处理。
明白，添加EscalationRequired分支。这个状态内部需要包含哪些升级步骤？
EscalationRequired包含IncidentEscalation事件升级，ManagementNotification管理层通知，ExternalSupport外部支持，CrisisManagement危机管理，EmergencyProtocol紧急协议，最后SystemShutdown系统关闭。
已添加升级处理流程。SystemShutdown之后进入EmergencyRecovery紧急恢复？
对，EmergencyRecovery包含DisasterRecoveryPlan灾难恢复计划，BackupActivation备份激活，FailoverExecution故障转移执行，BusinessContinuity业务连续性，最后EmergencyComplete。
已添加紧急恢复流程。EmergencyComplete之后回到RecoveryPhase？
是的，EmergencyComplete之后进入RecoveryPhase继续后续的恢复流程。现在检查一下所有HealthTech相关的节点引用是否正确？

发现一个问题：在SeverityClassification中，MediumSeverity和CriticalSeverity的节点引用需要调整。MediumSeverity应该关联HealthTech_PatientRecords，CriticalSeverity应该关联HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。另外HighSeverity关联HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
确认修改。另外检查一下ContinuousMonitoring中的RealtimeDataCollection循环是否正确指向。
已修正。FrequencyDomainAnalysis完成后应该返回RealtimeDataCollection形成监控循环，而不是结束。另外BaselineEstablishment的入口也需要确认是从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault开始。
确认所有修正。系统启动标注为"Sistem Başlatıldı"，基线就绪标注为"Baseline Hazır"，各转换条件使用土耳其语标注。整体结构完整，覆盖了HIPAA医疗系统的完整安全事件响应生命周期。

最终确认完成。状态图包含：NormalOperation及其子状态BaselineEstablishment和ContinuousMonitoring；AnomalyDetectionTriggered及其子状态ConfidenceScoring和SeverityClassification；ThreatIntelligence及其子状态BehavioralAnalysis；ResponseStrategy及其子状态StrategySelection和ActionPlanGeneration；MitigationExecution及其三层防御；ForensicAnalysis及其三个子状态；RecoveryPhase及其三个子状态；LessonsLearned闭环；以及EscalationRequired和EmergencyRecovery应急分支。所有HealthTech组件正确引用，转换条件已标注。
